title: Align issue create json with the show contract
description:
Make the machine-readable output of issue creation agree with the output of issue show, so consumers see one stable issue shape regardless of which command produced it.

## Background

issue create --json and issue show --json disagree on shape for the same issue. create serializes the raw Issue (JsonOutput::success(issue, ...) at main.rs:1001), so it emits the legacy gates_required/gates_status fields, no short_id, and unenriched dependencies. show emits the agreed contract via IssueShowResponse (output.rs:827, with a per-gate gates array from GateView at output.rs:789), including short_id and enriched dependency and label arrays. A consumer that reads create output gets a different, legacy shape and must special-case it.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-14: the issue create --json payload matches the issue show --json contract — it contains short_id, a per-gate gates array (not the legacy gates_required/gates_status), and enriched dependency and label arrays.

## Notes

Build the create response with IssueShowResponse::from_issue (output.rs:827), the same builder issue show uses (main.rs:475, 1236), passing an empty gate-run slice for the freshly created issue so its gates surface as pending. Replace the raw-Issue JsonOutput::success path at main.rs:1001. This subsumes the original short_id-only scope.
